title: rosa leeana
intro: Rosa leeana, also known as Rosa bracteata, is a species of rose that is native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It is a shrub-like plant with fragrant, yellow flowers and has been used for its medicinal and culinary properties. The plant has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Rosa leeana can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and salves, to harness its health benefits, including reducing fever and promoting relaxation.
